title: A Tempo — Festival di Nuovi Linguaggi, 2ª edizione
description: World premiere of “Fecero un deserto e lo chiamarono Pace” for ensemble and electronics. Luigi Cascarano (clarinet), Davide Lepre (percussion), Emanuela Storelli (cello), Silvio Lotito (sound engineering). Project coordination by Filippo Lattanzi.

title: Danze e Variazioni — Ri-Lettura VII
description: World premiere of “Chiari Ombre” for violin and cello (commissioned by TOF). Ulisse Mazzon (violin), Maria Mafalda Mazzon (cello).

title: Risonanze di Confine — Testimonianze dall'Ucraina
description: Performance of “It’s a Long, Long Way to Therapy” for string quartet and live electronics. Nicoletta Leone (violin), Silvia Zeverino (violin), Nicolò Salzo (viola), Ilenia Piccolo (cello), Alessio Roma (electronics). Charity event to raise funds for the purchase of an ambulance for conflict-affected areas in Ukraine.

title: Passati Presenti
description: World premiere of “Constellations” for symphony orchestra. The Conducting Class Orchestra of the "Niccolò Piccinni" Conservatory in Bari, conducted by Roberto Casulli.

title: Intorno alle musiche d'oggi — Tavola rotonda
description: Presentation as part of the events marking the 100th anniversary of the SIMC.

title: Giornata di studi: Insegnare la composizione
description: Performance of “Posters” for clarinet and piano. Domenico Cetera (clarinet), Sara Sasso (piano). Events marking the 100th anniversary of the founding of the SIMC.

title: Nuove musiche per nuove generazioni
description: Performance of “Serenade for a Panic Attack No. 2” for alto saxophone. Isacco Buccoliero (alto saxophone). Events marking the 100th anniversary of the SIMC.
